title: Hathras Fort
tagline: Hathras Fort — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: The Hathras Fort, (also known as Raja Dayaram Fort and Shri Dauji Mandi) was constructed by Raja Dayaram Singh in the 18th century.
overview.description: The Hathras Fort, (also known as Raja Dayaram Fort and Shri Dauji Mandi) was constructed by Raja Dayaram Singh in the 18th century. It is located in the city of Hathras in Uttar Pradesh. Commonly known as Kila Gate, Hathras Fort is a popular tourist site, although it is not registered as a tourist place in Uttar Pradesh. The Siege of Hathras also known as the Hathras Rebellion, took place at the fort between Raja Dayaram, ruler of Hathras, and the British East India Company in February 1817.

topPlaces.name: 2020 Hathras gang rape and murder
topPlaces.description: On 14 September 2020, a gang-rape of a 19-year-old woman was reported in Hathras district, Uttar Pradesh, India, by four men. She died two weeks later in a Delhi hospital.

topPlaces.name: Hathras
topPlaces.description: Hathras (Hindi pronunciation: [ɦaːt̪ʰ.ɾəs]) is a historical city in Uttar Pradesh, India. It is the headquarters of Hathras district, formed on 3 May 1997 by merging parts of Aligarh, Mathura and Agra.

topPlaces.description: Mendu is a town and a nagar panchayat in Hathras district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — 2020 Hathras gang rape and murder & around

items.note: On 14 September 2020, a gang-rape of a 19-year-old woman was reported in Hathras district, Uttar Pradesh, India, by four men. She died two weeks later in a Delhi hospital.

Hathras (Hindi pronunciation: [ɦaːt̪ʰ.ɾəs]) is a historical city in Uttar Pradesh, India. It is the headquarters of Hathras district, formed on 3 May 1997 by merging parts of Aligarh, Mathura and Agra.
Mendu is a town and a nagar panchayat in Hathras district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hathras Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hathras Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hathras Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (50 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hathras Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hathras Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hathras Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Hathras Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hathras Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are 2020 Hathras gang rape and murder, Hathras, Mendu.
